narrative:
Precinct Fairfield Twp (precinct in Huron County) has 686 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.7 percentage points.
